summary: Tested scheduled auto-save feature for Bulk Category Editor. All backend draft endpoints (GET, POST, DELETE) working correctly (7/7 tests passed). Frontend auto-save indicator, draft recovery banner, Restore and Discard buttons all verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend draft endpoints correctly implement upsert pattern with MongoDB
Frontend auto-save timer correctly fires every 30 seconds when modal is open
Auto-save indicator correctly shows 'Draft saved' with timestamp
Draft recovery banner correctly appears when reopening modal with existing draft
Restore button correctly restores selections from draft
Discard button correctly clears draft from server
Cancel button correctly clears draft from server
seed_data_creation: Created test drafts via API for testing recovery banner
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-save feature fully tested: (1) Backend draft endpoints at /api/bulk-edit-tools/draft (GET, POST, DELETE) all working with upsert pattern. (2) Frontend auto-save timer fires every 30 seconds when modal is open and selections have changed. (3) Auto-save indicator shows 'Draft saved [timestamp]' with green checkmark. (4) Draft recovery banner appears when reopening modal with existing draft, showing 'Unsaved draft found from [date]' with Restore/Discard buttons. (5) Restore button restores selections and hides banner. (6) Discard button clears draft from server and hides banner. (7) Cancel button clears draft from server.

frontend_tests.draft_recovery_banner_appears: PASS - data-testid='draft-recovery-banner' found with 'Unsaved draft found' message
frontend_tests.restore_button_works: PASS - data-testid='restore-draft-btn' restores selections and hides banner
frontend_tests.discard_button_works: PASS - data-testid='discard-draft-btn' clears draft and hides banner
frontend_tests.auto_save_indicator_appears: PASS - data-testid='auto-save-indicator' shows 'Draft saved [timestamp]' after 30 seconds
frontend_tests.cancel_clears_draft: PASS - Cancel button clears draft from server
